title: Heterosavia erythroxyloides
taxonomy: Heterosavia erythroxyloides is classified within the family Phyllanthaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the 'leaf-flower family'. The genus Heterosavia is a part of the subfamily Phyllanthoideae. This classification places Heterosavia erythroxyloides within the order Malpighiales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The classification of Heterosavia erythroxyloides is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies. The exact classification may be subject to revision as new research and data become available.
